voice_adherence.weakest_moment: "Đau. Không — đau là từ quá nhẹ. Đau ám chỉ tổn thương khu trú, có thể định vị, có thể mô tả. Đây là thứ khác. Đây là toàn bộ hệ thần kinh bị kích hoạt cùng lúc."
voice_adherence.fix: The voice profile demands body-before-emotion and technical/neurological vocabulary. This passage explains pain conceptually instead of rendering it through the body. Replace with something like: "Đau. Không — đau có tọa độ. Đau có bản đồ. Cái này không có. Toàn bộ hệ thần kinh — từ thái dương đến gót chân — bắn cùng một tần số. 847 lần đổ bộ. Không lần nào như thế này. Não không xử lý được. Quá tải. Bộ đệm đầy."
voice_adherence.note: The chapter largely nails the cold, surgical tone. The best moments use technical vocabulary (ping, bộ đệm, gói tin) to describe dissolution. The confession scene and the electrode application are strong voice moments. The weakest is when the prose stops to explain pain rather than rendering it through Cường's specific vocabulary.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 3 (the confession note) is present but the emotional weight is underdeveloped. The note reads: *Tôi là Trần Cường. Tôi đã cưỡng hiếp và hủy hoại Lan. Đây là sự đền tội.* — but the narrative immediately moves to counting words and imagining who will read it, rather than letting the act of writing land.
beat_coverage.fix: Expand the confession beat. Show Cường's hand trembling. Show him misspelling and rewriting. Show the specific memory that forces him to write 'cưỡng hiếp' — not the abstract knowledge, but a flash of specific sensation he once felt entitled to. The confession should cost him something to write.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats are present and dramatized. The phone call with Bảo is the strongest — visceral, specific, with Bảo's broken crying earning the scene. The electrode application is methodical and appropriately clinical. The final beat (entering the tank) is well-executed. The confession note is the only beat that feels rushed.

character_voice.weakest_moment: "Mày biết cái đó làm gì không?" — Bảo's dialogue is functional but slightly generic. The voice profile specifies he speaks in 3-5 word bursts and says 'Không biết' reflexively. This line could be more Bảo-specific.
character_voice.fix: Consider: *"Mày..."* Bảo nuốt nước bọt. *"Mày biết. Tao không nói. Lấy đi. Dùng đi. Đừng gọi."* — shorter, more defensive, more Bảo. Let his fear show through what he won't say rather than through explanation.
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is excellent throughout — the counting, the clinical observations, the way he processes Bảo's grief as data. Bảo's crying is the most surprising character moment: a man who speaks in 3-5 word sentences breaking into sobs. That's real. The confession note reveals character through action. Strong differentiation.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The direct electrodes are mentioned but their specific function (bypassing safety layers to push the transfer to 100%) is explained rather than shown through consequence. The reader is told they'll cause 91-97% neural damage before feeling any effect.
plants_seeded.fix: Let the electrodes' danger emerge through sensation rather than screen warnings. When Cường first attaches them, show a micro-jolt or an unexpected sensory bleed — something that makes the reader understand the danger viscerally before the system confirms it.
plants_seeded.note: The confession note is well-planted — it will be found by Hạnh, Tuấn, or Bà Lành, creating future plot consequences. The amplifier's history (the man who smiled while his brain burned) is an effective plant that haunts the chapter. Bảo's tears seed future guilt/reckoning.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: "Đau không giảm — nó tăng. Nhưng sau một ngưỡng nào đó, đau không còn là đau. Nó trở thành tín hiệu. Tần số. Sóng."
prose_quality.fix: This is conceptually clear but rhythmically flat — four short declaratives in a row. Vary: "Đau không giảm. Tăng. Nhưng sau một ngưỡng — Cường không biết ngưỡng nào, không có con số — đau trở thành tín hiệu. Tần số. Sóng não phẳng, chỉ còn nhiễu nền."
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: "Mỗi gói tin rời đi là một phần của Trần Cường biến mất, và phần bị mất ấy — không có từ nào mô tả cảm giác. Nó trống. Trống rỗng. Trống rỗng ở nơi từng có gì đó."
prose_quality.note: The prose is strongest when it uses Cường's technical vocabulary to describe dissolution (gói tin, bộ đệm, nhiễu). It's weakest when it reaches for abstract emotional statement. The sentence variety is generally good — fragments, medium sentences, and occasional long flowing ones. Some paragraphs could be cut (the repeated screen readouts become redundant).

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. The transfer process at 23%, the 47% erasure, the 36.8°C constant — all carried forward accurately. Cường's emotional state (resigned, determined, past fear) tracks perfectly from his earlier realization that Lan is warming on her own. The vết bầm progressing to necrosis is a logical physical consequence. The only minor issue: the previous chapter ends with Cường's consciousness fading, but this chapter opens with him in Cumberland making a phone call. The transition could use a brief temporal marker.

violations: Minor: The chapter states Cường has made '853 lần đổ bộ' but the world bible establishes 847 as of 2041. If this is set later, the count should be explicitly updated in the text or the discrepancy acknowledged.
Minor: The amplifier is described as 'thế hệ 4' but the world bible doesn't establish generation numbering for Neural Mantle equipment. Not a contradiction, but an addition that should be tracked.
Minor: 'Lan' as the Kẻ Đuổi's real name is new information not in the character bible. This is a significant reveal that should be noted as new canon.
canon_compliance.note: No major violations. The physical descriptions (hầm Haymarket, buồng triệt giác, Cumberland tunnel) match established canon. The magic system rules are respected — direct neural connection causing irreversible damage is consistent with established principles. The transfer process is a logical extension of the system's capabilities.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The Cumberland tunnel section is brief and could use more sensory specificity from the world bible — the smell of 'axit, mồ hôi, và thứ gì đó giống thịt thối rữa' is mentioned but the 'meat rotting' aspect is dropped in favor of just 'axit.'
lore_integration.fix: Add one detail from the Cumberland lore: the makeshift tanks, the high burn rate, the specific desperation. When Cường passes the Du Mục in the bathtub, add a sensory beat — the wrong-color solution, the cheap electrodes, the way the body twitches. Show why Bảo fears this place.
lore_integration.note: The lore does genuine work here. The amplifier's origin (police evidence room, via Bảo), the transfer mechanics, the neural damage thresholds — all are integral to the plot rather than decoration. The confession note connects to the legal framework (Điều 47B). St. Vincent's geography matters. This is lore as engine, not wallpaper.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section — from retrieving the amplifier to entering the tank — is the least engaging. The procedure of setting up electrodes is methodical and appropriate for character, but the screen readout repetitions (QUÁ TRÌNH CHUYỂN: 31%, 38%, 41%, 43%) create a rhythmic monotony that diffuses tension rather than building it.
engagement.fix: Cut at least two of the four screen readout paragraphs. Replace one with a sensory detail (the gel warming against his skull, the taste of copper in his mouth from biting his tongue). Replace another with a fragment of memory — not a full flashback, just a flash: Lan's voice saying something, or the smell of hoa sữa in the render. Let the percentage climb be felt rather than read.
engagement.note: The chapter's strongest engagement comes from two sources: Bảo's phone call (genuinely surprising emotional breakdown) and the confession note (the word 'cưỡng hiếp' landing with full weight). The ending — Cường choosing to stop thinking, just lying and waiting — is quietly devastating. The weakest point is the procedural middle that reads more like instructions than experience.

three_weakest_sentences: Đau không giảm — nó tăng. Nhưng sau một ngưỡng nào đó, đau không còn là đau. Nó trở thành tín hiệu. Tần số. Sóng.
Quá trình sẽ tiếp tục trong bốn đến bảy giờ. Trần Cường sẽ nằm trong buồng triệt giác, não bộ cháy dần, ý thức tan biến, trong khi Lan — từng chút, từng gói tin, từng ký ức — được trả lại cơ thể cô.
Cường ghi nhận nhưng không cảm thấy gì. Không phải vì vô cảm — vì đã quá tải. Kiệt sức cảm xúc. Bộ đệm đầy. Không còn chỗ cho thêm.
three_strongest_sentences: Mỗi gói tin rời đi là một phần của Trần Cường biến mất, và phần bị mất ấy — không có từ nào mô tả cảm giác. Nó trống. Trống rỗng. Trống rỗng ở nơi từng có gì đó.
Rồi anh ta khóc. Không phải kiểu khóc rên rỉ — là kiểu khóc nấc, tiếng nấc cụt lủn, như người bị đấm vào bụng.
Trở về nghĩa là tiếp tục tồn tại như Trần Cường — kẻ kế toán, kẻ Du Mục, kẻ đã cưỡng hiếp ý thức một người phụ nữ đang nằm hôn mê trong 853 lần đổ bộ.
ai_patterns_detected: Screen readout repetition pattern: Four nearly identical server status blocks create a mechanical rhythm that feels template-driven rather than organic.
Slight over-explanation of emotional states: 'Không phải vì vô cảm — vì đã quá tải' explains what could be shown through body or behavior.
Uniform paragraph length in the middle section: Several consecutive paragraphs of similar length (3-5 sentences) create a visual monotony on the page.
top_3_revisions: Cut two of the four server readout paragraphs and replace with sensory fragments or memory flashes — let the transfer percentage be felt through the body rather than read through screens.

Expand the confession note scene: show Cường's hand trembling, show him hesitate before writing 'cưỡng hiếp,' show the specific memory that forces the word out of him. This is the emotional core of the chapter and it currently reads as procedural.

Revise the pain description (the 'Đau không giảm' passage) to use Cường's technical vocabulary rather than abstract statement: give the pain coordinates, frequencies, data points. Make it sound like a system failure report, not a novel.
new_canon_entries: The Kẻ Đuổi's real name is Lan (revealed through Cường's confession note).
Bảo possesses a neural signal amplifier (thế hệ 4) hidden in Cumberland tunnel, third passage, behind a Hemera Gen 2 cable crate, in a metal box with combination 7-7-4-2.
A previous user of the amplifier died with a smile (frozen facial muscles from frontal lobe overload) two years ago in Cumberland.
Cường's confession note reads: 'Tôi là Trần Cường. Tôi đã cưỡng hiếp và hủy hoại Lan. Đây là sự đền tội.' — written on a yellow sticky note and placed on the server monitor.
Direct neural electrode connection (bypassing Neural Mantle safety layers) can push the consciousness transfer process to 100% but causes 91-97% neural tissue damage.
The vết bầm on Cường's left ribs has progressed to necrosis — black, dead tissue, leaking clear fluid that smells faintly of hoa sữa.
